title: AvM mod
description: The popular "Animation vs. Minecraft" franchise is in real Minecraft!
body:
This mod contains almost all of the features from Alan Becker's popular animation series "Animation vs. Minecraft"! 

There's the Powerful staff from third season, game icon, Titan ravager, much of food from 32nd episode and even Super pig from 4th episode! If you want to know about features in this mod, you can just watch some of the episodes!

If you want to use staff with Command block or Game Icon, just ALT + V/B/N/M (you can change buttons in options)

Вся информация по этому моду находится в этих роликах:
